CustomField.description: When enabled, all year-based Opportunity rollup fields (e.g., Total Donations This Year) use the org's fiscal year instead of the calendar year. Configure your fiscal year in Setup > Company Information > Fiscal Year. Custom Fiscal Year settings are NOT supported and will be auto-detected and disabled unless Force Fiscal Year is checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use fiscal year instead of calendar year for rollup calculations. Configure in Setup > Company Information > Fiscal Year. Custom Fiscal Years are not supported.
CustomField.label: Use Fiscal Year for Rollups
